title: Better Faster Crafting
description: For those who want a pleasant bench experience with superior performance.
body:
This modpack is made to enhance as much as possible to improve the overall performance, atmosphere and feature set, without drastically changing anything that makes the base game so magical.

- Light pack 60 mods only so far.
- Superior performance and optimization improvements.
- Enhanced vanilla experience without overkill like other modpacks.

This is made exclusively for people who want to play completely vanilla, in a totally new way, focused also for servers.

Without further ado, enjoy the experience :)

My server Discord: https://discord.com/invite/FSysYhQTY7
